_comment: WPORT-6 expected-observation 4: fetch_chain_a points at a URL that 404s. Kahn order loads c then b (both succeed and stay loaded), then a's fetch fails -> the injected adapter throws on !r.ok, rejecting with ArtifactLoadError 'artifact_fetch_failed: ...' whose data names artifact fetch_chain_a, the bad URL, stage 'fetch', and loaded [fetch_chain_c, fetch_chain_b].
